title: Spaceflight News API Article
description: Schema for a spaceflight news article returned by the Spaceflight News API

title.example: NASA adjusts ISS flight schedule for upcoming missions

authors.description: List of authors who contributed to this article

url.description: Link to the full article on the original publication site

image_url.description: URL of the featured image for this article

news_site.description: Name of the publishing news organization

summary.description: Brief summary or excerpt of the article content

published_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the article was originally published

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update to this record

featured.description: Whether this article is featured or highlighted

launches.description: Launch Library 2 launches related to this article

events.description: Launch Library 2 events related to this article

Author.title: Author
Author.description: An author who contributed to an article or blog post

socials.description: Social media links for the author

LaunchRef.title: Launch Reference
LaunchRef.description: Reference to a Launch Library 2 launch linked to a news item

EventRef.title: Event Reference
EventRef.description: Reference to a Launch Library 2 event linked to a news item
